name: REEF
author: REEF
description: First-party REEF companion plugin. The admin switchboard for REEF features: GIF search proxy (Giphy or Klipy, key stays server-side), custom status (presence), bug report emails via a mail relay, push notifications for offline mobile users (admin's choice of ntfy, webhook, or FCM — nothing Google is ever required), and policy toggles for soundboard and saved messages. Each feature has an on/off toggle. Runs on a stock Sharkord server; harmless to clients that don't use it.
